io.minio.messages

Class InputSerialization

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.minio.messages.InputSerialization

  • public class InputSerialization
extends Object
    Input serialization information of SelectObjectContentRequest.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  InputSerialization.CompressionType
      Compression format of CSV and JSON input serialization.
      static class  InputSerialization.CSV
      CSV input serialization information of InputSerialization.
      static class  InputSerialization.FileHeaderInfo
      First line description of CSV object.
      static class  InputSerialization.JSON
      JSON input serialization information of InputSerialization.
      static class  InputSerialization.JsonType
      JSON object type of InputSerialization.JSON.
      static class  InputSerialization.Parquet
      Parquet input serialization information of InputSerialization.
